title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Siemens India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Siemens India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Siemens India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!
